metadata.description: Local marketplace hosting the Foundry — a product-agnostic AI-agent software production ecosystem.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: The Foundry: specialized agents (guilds) assemble products from reusable modules using C4-style reference designs and quality gates, incl. a continuous architecture fitness function and an evidence-over-assertion verification protocol. Operator-chosen stack + design system, web-verified dependencies, cross-session memory, and spec-driven units. Install once; build any number of products.
